source_evidence: local v1262 run: python -B scripts/run_test_coverage.py --out-dir runs/test-coverage-v1262 --fail-under 80
notes: A2 starts from the first measured full unittest coverage baseline after A1 static/type gates.
The CI gate must use this fail_under value until a later version raises the floor with new evidence.
Lowering the floor requires changing this manifest and the tests that lock the ratchet.
